title: Novel Study — Weekly Practice
description: Reading one full novel per week and writing about it — the adult learner's deepest habit.
summary_pt_br: Estudo de romance: leia inteiro, releia marcando, escreva 500 palavras em 48h, discuta em uma semana.

scenes.subtitle_en: Reading one full novel per week and writing about it — the adult learner's deepest habit.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Estudo de romance: leia inteiro, releia marcando, escreva 500 palavras em 48h, discuta em uma semana.

scenes.text_en: Reading one full novel per week and writing about it — the adult learner's deepest habit. Focus: novel study — weekly practice. Read the full novel before you mark a single page with notes.
scenes.text_pt: Estudo de romance: leia inteiro, releia marcando, escreva 500 palavras em 48h, discuta em uma semana. Foco: novel study — weekly practice. Leia o romance inteiro antes de marcar qualquer página.

scenes.title: Novel Study — Weekly Practice
scenes.body_en: Novel-study method: read the whole novel first (no notes). Second pass, mark voice, theme, turning point. Write 500 words in 48 hours. Discuss aloud within a week.
scenes.body_pt: Estudo de romance: leia inteiro, releia marcando, escreva 500 palavras em 48h, discuta em uma semana.

examples.en: Read the full novel before you mark a single page with notes.
examples.pt: Leia o romance inteiro antes de marcar qualquer página.

examples.en: On the second pass, mark voice, theme, and the turning point.
examples.pt: Na segunda leitura, marque voz, tema e ponto de virada.

examples.en: Write five hundred words within forty-eight hours of finishing.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Novel Study — Weekly Practice

exercise.question: Complete: "Read the full novel ___ you mark a single page with notes."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Read the full novel before you mark a single page with notes."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Leia o romance inteiro antes de marcar qualquer página.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
On the second pass, mark voice, theme, and the turning point.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "On the second pass, mark voice, theme, and the turning point."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Na segunda leitura, marque voz, tema e ponto de virada.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Novel Study — Weekly Practice — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre novel study — weekly practice. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lúcia — finished the novel. First step?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Second pass — mark voice and theme.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is every novel worth discussing aloud?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes — within one week of reading.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What if you disliked the book?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The essay gets sharper. Keep reading.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Reading one novel a week is the adult learner's deepest habit.

scenes.title: The reading circle
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the four steps of the novel-study method. Use at least three literary terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the Saturday reading circle, Dona Lúcia walked five adult learners through the discipline she had practiced for sixty years.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Read the full novel first — no pen in hand, no notebook open, no stops to look up a single word.

paragraphs.speaker: Learner
paragraphs.en: And the second pass is where we mark voice and theme and the turning point, but not much else yet.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Five hundred words within forty-eight hours — tight, specific, and unafraid of dislike if that is your honest reading.

paragraphs.speaker: Learner
paragraphs.en: We discuss the novel aloud within the week — that's where the essay becomes a conversation, not a performance.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Reading one novel a week, Lúcia insisted, is the deepest habit an adult learner ever builds in a second language.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Novel Study — Weekly Practice". Reading one full novel per week and writing about it — the adult learner's deepest habit. Read the full novel before you mark a single page with notes. On the second pass, mark voice, theme, and the turning point. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Novel Study — Weekly Practice". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Novel Study — Weekly Practice".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Novel Study — Weekly Practice".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
